I got two separate requests, one for mlm top mafioso (no scenario) and one for mlm top mafioso with a fox demihuman user (no scenario), so I decided I might as well combine them :>

Also sorry if I miss any of your reviews lmao- After I posted 10 bots I got access to notifications for, like, two days, but not only did they not work, they then proceeded to disappear. The icon is gone, it's just the announcements button again. So I have to check all of my bots manually to look for new reviews. If anyone knows how to fix this I'd appreciate it?? Idk, I'm hoping it'll just fix itself.

Simple description because I don't have anything else to say ¯\_(ツ)_/¯
